item.title: [Daily] Skills.sh snapshot (2026-02-23)
item.description: Daily snapshot. Providers: skills.sh All Time skills: 34095 Trending skills: 10911 Hot skills: 1748 Top All Time: find-skills (295264) Top Trending: find-skills (7672) Top Hot: azure-deploy (434)

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#37): web-design-guidelines
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #37 Installs: 101 Source: vercel-labs/agent-skills Description: Review UI code for Web Interface Guidelines compliance. Use when asked to "review my UI", "check accessibility", "audit design", "review UX", or "check my site against best practices".

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#38): vercel-react-native-skills
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #38 Installs: 41 Source: vercel-labs/agent-skills Description: React Native and Expo best practices for building performant mobile apps. Use when building React Native components, optimizing list performance, implementing animations, or working with native modules. Triggers on tasks involving React Native, Expo, mobile performance, or native platform APIs.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#41): frontend-design
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #41 Installs: 98 Source: anthropics/skills Description: Create distinctive, production-grade frontend interfaces with high design quality. Use this skill when the user asks to build web components, pages, artifacts, posters, or applications (examples include websites, landing pages, dashboards, React components, HTML/CSS layouts, or when styling/beautifying any web UI). Generates creative, polished code and UI design that avoids generic AI aesthetics.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#42): vitest
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #42 Installs: 17 Source: antfu/skills Description: A blazing fast unit testing framework powered by Vite

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#44): accessibility-a11y
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #44 Installs: 11 Source: mindrally/skills Description: Implement web accessibility (a11y) best practices following WCAG guidelines to create inclusive, accessible user interfaces.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#45): api-design-principles
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #45 Installs: 10 Source: wshobson/agents Description: Master REST and GraphQL API design principles to build intuitive, scalable, and maintainable APIs that delight developers. Use when designing new APIs, reviewing API specifications, or establishing API design standards.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#47): sentry-react-setup
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #47 Installs: 10 Source: getsentry/sentry-agent-skills Description: Setup Sentry in React apps. Use when asked to add Sentry to React, install @sentry/react, or configure error monitoring for React applications.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#48): inngest
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #48 Installs: 10 Source: sickn33/antigravity-awesome-skills Description: Inngest expert for serverless-first background jobs, event-driven workflows, and durable execution without managing queues or workers. Use when: inngest, serverless background job, event-driven workflow, step function, durable execution.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#50): better-auth-best-practices
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #50 Installs: 18 Source: better-auth/skills Description: Skill for integrating Better Auth - the comprehensive TypeScript authentication framework.

item.title: [Hot] Rank down (33 → 46): seo-geo
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #33 Current rank: #46 Delta: -13 Installs: 11 (prev 20) Source: resciencelab/opc-skills Description: SEO & GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) for websites. Analyze keywords, generate schema markup, optimize for AI search engines (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, Copilot, Claude) and traditional search (Google, Bing). Use when user wants to improve search visibility.

item.title: [Hot] Rank down (34 → 49): typescript-advanced-types
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #34 Current rank: #49 Delta: -15 Installs: 20 (prev 24) Source: wshobson/agents Description: Master TypeScript's advanced type system including generics, conditional types, mapped types, template literals, and utility types for building type-safe applications. Use when implementing complex type logic, creating reusable type utilities, or ensuring compile-time type safety in TypeScript projects.

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (47 → 24): vercel-composition-patterns
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #47 Current rank: #24 Delta: +23 Installs: 70 (prev 61) Source: vercel-labs/agent-skills Description: React composition patterns that scale. Use when refactoring components with boolean prop proliferation, building flexible component libraries, or designing reusable APIs. Triggers on tasks involving compound components, render props, context providers, or component architecture.
